output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?tree ?volumeValue ?label WHERE {
  ?tree wdt:P31 wd:Q811534 ; wdt:P2053 ?volume .
  ?volume wikibase:quantityValue ?volumeValue .
  ?volume wikibase:quantityUnit wd:Q35120 .
  FILTER(?volumeValue > 912.5)
  ?tree rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = "en")
}

Looking up Q152482 on Wikidata: it has "volume" (P2048) with a value of 1,487 m³. So the property is P2048.

Ah, that's probably the correct property. So trunk volume is under P2048 (volume), not P2053 (trunk volume). P2053 was a guess earlier, but the actual property used is P2048.
